title: beyeria minor
intro: Beyeria minor, also known as the small bitter-berry, is a species of plant in the family Cephalotaceae. This plant is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Beyeria minor include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Beyeria minor can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and have been used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
